'''Quarren Tower''' was a building in [[Coral City/Legends|Coral City]], [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. Its uppermost room was a large, circular area that had a 360-degree view of the surrounding area. Near the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was used as a place for meetings of the [[New Jedi Order]] leadership.<ref name="TUF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
